title: alitubus millefolium
intro: Alitubus millefolium, also known as Yarrow, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Alitubus millefolium include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Alitubus millefolium include its ability to improve digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alitubus millefolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
